name: cloud-architecture seed: every catalog entry is tier 1 and class published-standard
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/standards/cloud-architecture-sources.yaml","utf8");const tiers=(y.match(/^\s+tier: \d+/mg)||[]);const cls=(y.match(/^\s+class: published-standard/mg)||[]);process.exit(tiers.length===12 && tiers.every(t=>/tier: 1/.test(t)) && cls.length===12 ?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
